ksa_text: Monitor and optimize data application performance including resource utilization analysis, query performance profiling, bottleneck identification, and capacity planning for growth.

dcwf.top_element_label: Knowledge of basic system administration, network, and operating system hardening techniques.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies and procedures are in place to address AI risks and benefits arising from third-party software and data and other supply chain issues.

top_anchors.element_label: Knowledge of basic system administration, network, and operating system hardening techniques.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA TF-T-005 (TF, Task) does not clear the moderate fit inclusion threshold of 0.43. Composite score 0.4257 is insufficient to establish relevance to performance metrics, KPI analysis, and operational reporting at IC-to-senior-IC level. Framework signals (eu_ai_act=0.426, ddat=0.414, dcwf=0.400) do not demonstrate sufficient alignment with core analytics/BI work.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.challenge: TF domain KSA TF-T-005 excluded at composite 0.4257, but KSA text contains direct analytics-domain signals. Internal consistency: the presence of analytics terminology in a moderate fit KSA at score 0.4257 suggests the threshold is excluding genuinely relevant content.
pass_3_adversarial_internal.rebuttal: Composite 0.4257 with confirmed analytics-domain terminology for a TF (moderate fit) KSA indicates real role relevance for Performance Analyst. The 0.43 threshold is a calibration heuristic; text-signal confirmation overrides marginal score shortfall at this level.
pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 exclude overturned. TF KSA with composite 0.4257 and confirmed analytics-domain text signals included on internal consistency grounds.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does KSA TF-T-005 (TF, composite 0.4257) appear in published data analyst / BI role profiles and workforce frameworks?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: KSA content aligns with O*NET 15-2051.00 tools/technology section; DCWF technical foundations competencies for analytics work roles. Analytics-domain terminology in KSA text confirms practical relevance to IC ANL work. Composite 0.4257 with signal across eu_ai_act=0.426, ddat=0.414, dcwf=0.400 is consistent with documented ANL competency expectations at IC-to-senior-IC level. External ground truth supports inclusion.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 include upheld. External evidence from TF-domain frameworks confirms KSA relevance to Performance Analyst at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Single adversarial overturn by P3 internal consistency. Final decision: include. Composite 0.4257, domain TF. Medium confidence — one agent challenged and overturned the preliminary assessment.
